name: Terraform public SSH ingress
description: Synthetic Terraform scenario that exposes SSH from the public internet.

artifacts.description: Synthetic Terraform fixture with an internet-facing SSH ingress rule.

expected_findings.title: Public SSH ingress
expected_findings.rationale: SSH is exposed from 0.0.0.0/0, so a high-severity advisory must cite deterministic artifact evidence.

expected_evidence.description: Ingress rule allows traffic from the public internet.

expected_verdict_rationale: Warn because high-risk public SSH exposure has deterministic Terraform evidence.

license.source: Original synthetic fixture authored for public benchmark use.
